mapper.select: SELECT tp.plan_no, tp.user_no, tp.plan_title, tp.plan_is_public, tp.plan_status, tp.plan_start_date, tp.plan_end_date, NVL(u.user_nickName, NVL(u.user_name, 'Traveler')) AS user_name, NVL(ts.travel_type_name, 'adventurer') AS type_id, NVL( ( SELECT MAX(pd.plan_meno) FROM Plan_Details pd WHERE pd.plan_no = tp.plan_no AND pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL ), NVL(tp.plan_title, 'Untitled Plan') || ' itinerary' ) AS description, 0 AS like_count, NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.wish_no) FROM wishlist w WHERE w.place_no IN ( SELECT pd2.place_no FROM Plan_Details pd2 WHERE pd2.plan_no = tp.plan_no ) ), 0 ) AS saved_count, CASE WHEN ts.travel_type_name IS NULL THEN 70 ELSE 90 END AS match_score FROM Travel_Plans tp INNER JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = tp.user_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_no, MAX(travel_type_name) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY travel_analyzed_date NULLS LAST, style_user_no ) AS travel_type_name FROM Travel_Styles GROUP BY user_no ) ts ON ts.user_no = tp.user_no WHERE NVL(tp.plan_is_public, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY tp.plan_no DESC

SELECT tp.plan_no, tp.user_no, tp.plan_title, tp.plan_is_public, tp.plan_status, tp.plan_start_date, tp.plan_end_date, NVL(u.user_nickName, NVL(u.user_name, 'Traveler')) AS user_name, NVL(ts.travel_type_name, 'adventurer') AS type_id, NVL( ( SELECT MAX(pd.plan_meno) FROM Plan_Details pd WHERE pd.plan_no = tp.plan_no AND pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL ), NVL(tp.plan_title, 'Untitled Plan') || ' itinerary' ) AS description, 0 AS like_count, NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.wish_no) FROM wishlist w WHERE w.place_no IN ( SELECT pd2.place_no FROM Plan_Details pd2 WHERE pd2.plan_no = tp.plan_no ) ), 0 ) AS saved_count, CASE WHEN ts.travel_type_name IS NULL THEN 70 ELSE 90 END AS match_score FROM Travel_Plans tp INNER JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = tp.user_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_no, MAX(travel_type_name) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY travel_analyzed_date NULLS LAST, style_user_no ) AS travel_type_name FROM Travel_Styles GROUP BY user_no ) ts ON ts.user_no = tp.user_no WHERE tp.plan_no = #{value}

SELECT tp.plan_no, tp.user_no, tp.plan_title, tp.plan_is_public, tp.plan_status, tp.plan_start_date, tp.plan_end_date, NVL(u.user_nickName, NVL(u.user_name, 'Traveler')) AS user_name, NVL(ts.travel_type_name, 'adventurer') AS type_id, NVL( ( SELECT MAX(pd.plan_meno) FROM Plan_Details pd WHERE pd.plan_no = tp.plan_no AND pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL ), NVL(tp.plan_title, 'Untitled Plan') || ' itinerary' ) AS description, 0 AS like_count, NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.wish_no) FROM wishlist w WHERE w.place_no IN ( SELECT pd2.place_no FROM Plan_Details pd2 WHERE pd2.plan_no = tp.plan_no ) ), 0 ) AS saved_count, CASE WHEN ts.travel_type_name IS NULL THEN 70 ELSE 90 END AS match_score FROM Travel_Plans tp INNER JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = tp.user_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_no, MAX(travel_type_name) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY travel_analyzed_date NULLS LAST, style_user_no ) AS travel_type_name FROM Travel_Styles GROUP BY user_no ) ts ON ts.user_no = tp.user_no WHERE tp.user_no = #{value} ORDER BY tp.plan_no DESC
